selected_tasks.body_preview: - Trajectory log feedback (Day 130): "shell tool commands failed during the session -> prefer bounded commands with explicit paths and inspect exit output before retrying broader checks" - `targeted_recovery_hint` in `src/tool_wrappers.rs:994` covers 7 bash failure classes (exit code, timeout, spawn, file-not-found, permission-denied, command-not-found, gene
selected_tasks.expected_evidence: `src/tool_wrappers.rs` appears in task lineage as the sole changed file Future bash failures matching "argument list too long" or "broken pipe" produce targeted hints instead of the generic fallback Implementation Notes: Add the new branches before the generic fallback `else` at line 1044, so specific patterns match before the catch-all Match on `msg_lower.c
selected_tasks.title: Add recovery hint for "argument list too long" and "broken pipe" bash failures

selected_tasks.body_preview: - Assessment Day 130: "3 error runs without FailureObserved events persist in the event stream. The terminal-state script (Day 127) was built to retroactively close these, but some gaps remain." - `yyds state why last-failure` output confirms: "correctly surfaces 3 error runs without FailureObserved events and 1 incomplete run" - Trajectory graph pressure: "
selected_tasks.expected_evidence: `src/commands_state.rs` appears in task lineage State events show `FailureObserved` and `RunCompleted` appended with `retroactive: true` in payload Graph pressure "state_run_unmatched_non_validation_completed_count" decreases `yyds state doctor` no longer flags the 3 historical gaps
selected_tasks.title: Add a `yyds state reconcile` subcommand to retroactively close historical lifecycle gaps

selected_tasks.body_preview: - Assessment Day 130 capability gap #4: "Eval fixture coverage: Open issue #37 requests additional held-out coding eval coverage for DeepSeek harness gnomes. The current 372-fixture suite covers protocol gates, state, context, and regression scenarios but could benefit from more coding-task eval coverage." - Trajectory: "fitness_score: unknown" — we lack hel
selected_tasks.expected_evidence: `src/eval_fixtures.rs` appears in task lineage as the sole changed file Eval fixture count increases from 372 → 373+ Future `yyds eval run` can measure FIM routing correctness as a held-out gate This is the first step toward a `coding_log_score` fitness gnome
selected_tasks.title: Add held-out eval fixture for DeepSeek FIM routing correctness
